title: Drosanthemum lique
taxonomy: Drosanthemum lique is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. This family includes succulents and is commonly known as the stone plant family. Drosanthemum lique is a type of succulent that is native to South Africa. Its classification is also that of a succulent of the genus Drosanthemum. The family Aizoaceae belongs to the order Caryophyllales, which includes various types of flowering plants.
